THEHEROEXPANSION-INFECTED.title: Infected
THEHEROEXPANSION-INFECTED.description:
[gold]Enchant[/gold] the cards adjacent to this one with [purple]Infected[/purple].
Infected cards gain [blue]5%[/blue] Damage and [gold]Block[/gold] for each Infected card in your deck.
[blue]({InfectedPercent:diff()}% Increase)[/blue]
THEHEROEXPANSION-DREAMY.title: Dreamy
THEHEROEXPANSION-DREAMY.description: Whenever this card is played, add a copy to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
